headline: ADI Chain Gains Ledger Support Amid 20% Stablecoin Surge

article.title: UAE-linked ADI Chain gains Ledger support amid stablecoin growth
article.summary: The integration gives ADI token holders access to Ledger’s self-custody platform as ADI Chain expands its stablecoin and tokenized asset network.

headline: $1M Crypto PAC Funds Fuel Texas Runoff Upsets

article.title: Crypto PAC money pours into Texas primary runoffs, as prediction markets favor challengers
article.summary: The crypto-aligned Protect Progress PAC reported spending another $750,000 on media for a Democratic candidate over Representative Al Green, whom it described as “actively hostile” to digital assets.

headline: Crude Plunges 3% on Hormuz Deal Progress

article.title: Oil Slides as US Touts Progress on Deal Toward Reopening Hormuz
article.summary: West Texas Intermediate crude briefly fell below $90 a barrel for the first time in almost three weeks amid signs the US and Iran were progressing toward an agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Gold Rises 2% on Iran Deal Hopes

article.title: Gold Gains as Prospects of Iran Deal Temper Inflation Concerns
article.summary: Gold advanced after officials signaled the US was nearing a deal with Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore oil flows, easing inflation fears.

headline: $1B AI Coding Risk Sparks Crypto Security Fears

article.title: Famed iPhone, Sony Hacker Says AI Coding Agents Are a Disaster Waiting to Happen
article.summary: George Hotz spent six months testing agents on real projects and came away convinced they're creating an avalanche of undetectable slop—and that large organizations won't realize it until it's too late.

headline: Squid Loses $3.2M in Crypto Module Hack

article.title: ‘We don’t know who deployed this’: Squid distances itself from $3.2 million third-party module exploit
article.summary: Squid said its core protocol was unaffected after a third-party module named SquidRouterModule was exploited for roughly $3.2 million.

headline: Indonesia Bans Polymarket in $100M Crypto Crackdown

article.summary: Indonesia blocked Polymarket over online gambling concerns as regulators widen global scrutiny of prediction market platforms.
